invariants.name: gyro-rate-sign
invariants.detail: corr=+0.052; expect < -0.4. Contract: gyro_x = -phi_dot. Check imu_invert, encoder_invert, or gyro negation in flight.py.

invariants.name: actuation-direction
invariants.detail: corr(m2-m1, d2(enc))=+0.002; expect < 0. Check mixer sign or motor wiring.

invariants.name: loop-timing
invariants.detail: max dt=30.0ms >= 25ms (isolated spike; p99=6.0ms is clean)

invariants.name: start-angle-sign
invariants.threshold: same sign and within 10deg of config start_angle_deg

invariants.name: feedforward-direction
invariants.detail: no-FF=1.5235, code(+)=1.6098, flip(-)=1.4792 deg. Code sign (+) makes estimate worse. See F1 in REVIEW-2026-06-10. Fix: change (+) to (-) in feedforward_roll in flight.py.
